heroSubtitleComplete: Result is shown below. Reset to verify again.
heroSubtitleInitial: 1:1 verification against an enrolled person by ID.
chooseOneDescription: Scan with your camera or upload a photo. Each capture is added to the images for verification.
cameraSubtitle: Open the camera and capture one face image
uploadSubtitle: Select one or more image files from your device
apiRefBody: Base URL https://api.verifik.co. Send the enrolled person's MongoDB id in id and one or more raw base64 face images in images (no data URL prefix). Optional collection_id scopes the check.
apiRefEndpointDesc: 1:1 against a known enrolled person: returns a data.match with score when the threshold is met.
paramImagesDesc: Array of base64 face images (same subject)
bulletApiClient: This demo uses verifyFace from @humanauthn/api-client with your session token.
bulletResponse: Responses include data.match and a signature block when enabled.

0.title: Face Comparison
0.description: 1:1 face comparison between two image sets without an enrolled person id.

1.title: Face Comparison (Live)
1.description: 1:1 comparison with liveness on the probe image.

3.title: Face Search (1:N)
3.description: Search by face image against enrolled persons in your collections.

4.title: Liveness Detection
4.description: Determine if a face is live vs spoof; liveness score.
